name: shallowswe-calibration-v0.1
description: Versioned cheap anchor panel for ShallowSWE tier calibration. Calibration runs are quarantined from published leaderboard results.

selection_policy.purpose: Define T1-T4 difficulty bands by median pass rate across inexpensive anchor rows rather than one control model.
selection_policy.published_stats_policy: Calibration rollouts do not count as published leaderboard rollouts.
selection_policy.versioning_policy: Bump the calibration panel version when an anchor model disappears or the panel is materially changed.

bands.t4: median pass rate 30-70% plus top-gated row >=80%
